content.query:
SELECT       I.ITNO                  [ItemNumber]
            , ITNE                  [OriginalItemNumber]
            , ITDS                  [Description]
            , FUDS                  [LongDescription]
            , ITCL                  [Brand Code]
            , BR.TX15               [Brand]
            , CA.TX15               [Category]
            , ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')
              + CASE WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')=SC.TX40 THEN '' 
                     WHEN ISNULL(I.PDLN,'')<>''     THEN '|'+SC.TX40 
                     ELSE '' 
                END                 [Sub-Category]
            , 0.00                  [Cost]
            , PUPR                  [Price]
            , CASE MABU WHEN '1' THEN '1|MAKE'
                        WHEN '2' THEN '2|BUY'
              END                  [Make or Buy]
            , CASE WHEN PRGP='' THEN 'UP' 
                   ELSE PRGP 
              END
              +'|'+CP.TX15          [ItemType]
            , I.STAT                [Status]
            , I.SUNO                [SupplierNumber]
            , V.SUNM                [SupplierName]
            , F.ORCO                [OriginCountry]
            , U.POPN                [UPC]
FROM            M3.MITMAS I
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB BR ON I.ITCL=BR.STKY AND BR.STCO='ITCL'   --Brand Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CA ON I.ITGR=CA.STKY AND CA.STCO='ITGR'   --Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CRPDLN SC ON I.PDLN=SC.PDLN                      --Sub-Category Lookup
     LEFT JOIN  M3.CSYTAB CP ON I.PRGP=CP.STKY AND CP.STCO='PRGP'   --Comp or FG
     LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS V ON I.SUNO = V.SUNO
     LEFT JOIN M3.MITFAC F ON I.ITNO = F.ITNO AND F.FACI = 'TLC'
     LEFT JOIN M3.MITPOP U ON I.ITNO = U.ITNO AND U.ALWQ = 'UPC' AND U.ALWT = '2'
WHERE I.CONO='100'
